methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.recipe.PyNativeRecipe.register_dependencies
documentation:
Prepare the material for execution in dry run mode. In this mode, we discover dependencies. Anything called with de_ref is considered a dependency. However, the recipe is not supposed to be actually executed.

Args:
    this (WhtMaterial): The material to be prepared

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.recipe.PyNativeRecipe.execute
documentation:
Prepare the recipe if necessary, and execute the recipe to create the material. In this call, it is safe to assume that dependent materials have already been executed.

Args:
    this (WhtMaterial): The material to be executed

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.recipe.PyNativeRecipe.describe
documentation:
Describe the material

Args:
    this (WhtMaterial): The material to be described

Returns:
    Tuple[str, str]: The content and extension of the material to be described

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.service.PythonRpcService.RegisterDependencies
documentation: Prepare the material for execution in dry run mode. In this mode, we discover dependencies. Anything called with de_ref is considered a dependency. However, the recipe is not supposed to be actually executed. warehouse is not supposed to be hit for discovering dependencies.

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.service.PythonRpcService.Execute
documentation: Prepare the recipe if necessary, and execute the recipe to create the material. In this call, it is safe to assume that dependent materials have already been executed.

documentation: Module for handling various warehouse connections
!/usr/bin/env python3
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: profiles_rudderstack.wh.ProfilesConnector
documentation:
Creates a connector object based on the config provided

Args:
    config: A dictionary containing the credentials and database information for the connector.
    **kwargs: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the connector.

Returns:
    ConnectorBase: Connector object.

Raises:
    Exception: Connector not found
SnowflakeConnector not used currently in profiles_rudderstack

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.wh.snowflake_connector.SnowflakeConnector.__create_connection
documentation: We are using the snowflake.connector to write and read only batched data from Snowflake
The sqlalchemy engine in the constructor is used for reading data, so we have a separate method for snowflake.connector connection
TODO: remove sqlalchemy engine and use snowflake.connector for reading data as well

modules.name: profiles_rudderstack.wh.connector_base
documentation: Base class for all other warehouse connectors.
!/usr/bin/env python3
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: profiles_rudderstack.wh.connector_base.ConnectorBase

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.wh.connector_base.ConnectorBase.__init__
documentation:
Initializes base class for all warehouse connectors.

Args:
    creds: Dictionary containing credentials for the warehouse.
    db_config: Dictionary containing database configuration.

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.wh.connector_base.ConnectorBase.run_query
documentation:
Runs a query on the warehouse.

Args:
    query: Query to be run.

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.wh.connector_base.ConnectorBase.write_to_table
documentation:
Writes given dataframe to warehouse table.

Args:
    df: Pandas dataframe containing data to be written to warehouse.
    table_name: Table name
    schema: Database schema
    if_exists: tag, Wether to append or replace data in the table.

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: This method is not implemented (Should be implemented in subclass).

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.wh.connector_base.ConnectorBase.get_table_data_batches
documentation:
Runs the query and returns an iterator
to get the results in the specified batch_size

Args:
    query: Query to be executed on the table
    batch_size: Size of the desired result set

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: This method is not implemented (Should be implemented in subclass).

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.wh.connector_base.ConnectorBase.create_table
documentation:
Creates a table in the warehouse.

Args:
    df: Pandas dataframe containing data to be written to warehouse.
    table_name: Table name
    schema: Database schema

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.wh.connector_base.ConnectorBase.__del__
documentation:
Delete function for connector base class.

Properly closes connection to warehouse.
Base class for all warehouse connectors.

documentation:
Builds a contract from a string or a dict

Args:
    contract (str): The contract to be built

Returns:
    Contract: The built contract

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.material.WhtMaterial.de_ref
documentation:
Dereference a material

Args:
    model_path (str): Path to the model

Keyword Args:
    dependency (str): normal, coercive or optional
    contract (Contract): Contract to be used
    pre_existing (bool): if true we search for pre-existing materials from material registry
    allow_incomplete_materials (bool): materials with complete status as complete(2) as well as incomplete(3)
    remember_context_as (str): saves the context of past/previous material in material registry entry of this material
    time_grain_spec (str): time grain spec

Returns:
    WhtMaterial: Dereferenced material

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.material.WhtMaterial.get_columns
documentation:
Get the columns of the material

Returns:
    List[dict]: List of columns

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.material.WhtMaterial.get_df
documentation:
Get the table data of the material.

Args:
    select_columns (List[str], optional): List of columns to be selected. Defaults to None.
    batching (bool, optional): Whether to use batching. Defaults to False.
    batch_size (int, optional): Batch size(not supported for snowpark). Defaults to 100000.

Returns:
    DataFrame: Table data as DataFrame or Iterable[DataFrame]

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.material.WhtMaterial.get_snowpark_df
documentation:
Get the table data of the material as Snowpark DataFrame.

Args:
    select_columns (List[str], optional): List of columns to be selected. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    DataFrame: Table data as Snowpark DataFrame

methods.name: profiles_rudderstack.material.WhtMaterial.write_output
documentation:
Write the dataframe as the output of the material

Args:
    df (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame to be written
    append_if_exists (bool, optional): Append to the table if it exists. Defaults to False.
